description: Add comprehensive E2E tests for the UX improvements implemented in PRDs 1-7: CLI plugin lifecycle, doctor/audit improvements, SDK ergonomics (typed prompts, structured fetch errors, indeterminate progress, displayName/icon defaults), plugin devx (source maps, side panel refresh), and side panel onboarding reset.

userStories.title: E2E tests for structured fetch errors with ErrorCategory
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I want E2E tests that verify fetchFromPage errors carry proper ErrorCategory metadata through the full dispatch chain.
acceptanceCriteria: A new tool 'sdk_fetch_error_categories' is added to the e2e-test plugin that exercises fetchFromPage against endpoints returning 401, 404, 429, and 500
E2E test verifies that calling the tool with a 401 endpoint returns an error with category 'auth' in the MCP response
E2E test verifies that calling the tool with a 404 endpoint returns an error with category 'not_found'
E2E test verifies that calling the tool with a 429 endpoint returns an error with category 'rate_limit' and retryable: true
E2E test verifies that a timeout from fetchFromPage returns an error with category 'timeout' and retryable: true
Test server endpoints are added for each HTTP status code scenario
All tests use the standard fixture pattern (mcpServer, testServer, extensionContext, mcpClient)

userStories.title: E2E tests for indeterminate progress reporting
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I want E2E tests verifying that tools can report progress without progress/total values.
acceptanceCriteria: A new tool 'indeterminate_progress' is added to the e2e-test plugin that calls context.reportProgress({ message: 'Working...' }) without progress/total
E2E test verifies that the MCP client receives the progress notification with message 'Working...'
E2E test verifies that progress: 0, total: 0 (or the indeterminate sentinel) are in the notification
The test uses callToolWithProgress to capture progress notifications

userStories.title: E2E tests for auto-derived displayName and default icon
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I want E2E tests verifying that tools without explicit displayName/icon get sensible defaults.
acceptanceCriteria: A new tool 'no_display_name' is added to the e2e-test plugin WITHOUT displayName and icon fields
E2E test verifies that tools/list returns the tool with displayName auto-derived from name ('No Display Name')
E2E test verifies that tools/list returns the tool with the default icon ('wrench')
E2E test verifies the tool is callable and functional despite omitted fields
The side panel shows the auto-derived display name correctly

userStories.title: E2E tests for typed prompt arguments with Zod schema
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I want E2E tests verifying that prompts defined with Zod args schemas work correctly through the full dispatch chain.
acceptanceCriteria: The e2e-test plugin's 'greet' prompt is updated to use the new Zod args schema (if not breaking existing tests)
A new prompt 'typed_greet' is added to the e2e-test plugin using the Zod args pattern
E2E test verifies that prompts/list returns the correct argument metadata derived from the Zod schema
E2E test verifies that prompts/get returns correctly rendered messages with typed args
E2E test verifies that prompts/get with missing required args returns an appropriate error

userStories.title: E2E tests for ToolError factory methods with custom codes
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I want E2E tests verifying that ToolError factory methods accept and propagate custom error codes.
acceptanceCriteria: A new tool 'error_custom_code' is added to the e2e-test plugin that throws ToolError.auth('msg', 'CUSTOM_AUTH_CODE')
E2E test verifies the MCP response contains 'code=CUSTOM_AUTH_CODE' instead of the default 'AUTH_ERROR'
E2E test verifies the category is still 'auth' despite the custom code
E2E test verifies retryable metadata is preserved with custom codes

userStories.title: E2E tests for removeLocalStorage and removeSessionStorage SDK utilities
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I want E2E tests verifying the new storage removal utilities work through the adapter dispatch chain.
acceptanceCriteria: A new tool 'sdk_remove_storage' is added to the e2e-test plugin that uses removeLocalStorage and removeSessionStorage
E2E test sets a localStorage key on the test page, calls the tool to remove it, then verifies the key is gone
E2E test does the same for sessionStorage

userStories.title: E2E tests for typed getPageGlobal with generics
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I want E2E tests verifying that getPageGlobal<T> works correctly with the new generic type parameter.
acceptanceCriteria: The existing 'sdk_get_page_global' tool already tests the basic functionality
E2E test verifies that getPageGlobal returns undefined for non-existent paths (not throwing)
E2E test verifies deep property access works (nested.deeply.nested.value)

userStories.title: E2E tests for audit --tool and --since filters
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I want E2E tests verifying the audit endpoint's tool and time-based filtering works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: E2E test invokes multiple different tools, then queries /audit with ?tool=<name> and verifies only matching entries are returned
E2E test queries /audit with ?tool=<name>&plugin=<name> combined filter and verifies correct filtering
The audit-logging.e2e.ts file is extended with these new test cases

userStories.title: E2E tests for doctor npm plugin health check
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I want E2E tests verifying that the /health endpoint provides accurate plugin health data that the doctor command can consume.
acceptanceCriteria: E2E test verifies /health returns pluginDetails with correct source ('local'), tabState, and toolCount for the e2e-test plugin
E2E test verifies /health returns failedPlugins array when a plugin fails to load
E2E test verifies that after toggling auth off, the tabState changes to 'unavailable' in /health
These tests exercise the data pipeline that opentabs doctor now consumes for npm plugin checks

userStories.title: E2E tests for side panel onboarding reset
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I want E2E tests verifying that the 'Show setup guide' link resets the onboarding flow.
acceptanceCriteria: E2E test starts with plugins, removes them, verifies the returning user empty state appears
E2E test clicks the 'Show setup guide' link and verifies the onboarding state with checklist appears
E2E test verifies that hasEverHadPlugins was reset in chrome.storage.local
Uses the manual infrastructure setup pattern (custom config, try/finally cleanup)

userStories.title: E2E tests for side panel auto-refresh on plugin rebuild
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I want E2E tests verifying that the side panel updates automatically when plugins are reloaded.
acceptanceCriteria: E2E test opens the side panel with plugins loaded and visible
E2E test triggers POST /reload on the MCP server to simulate a plugin rebuild
E2E test verifies the side panel updates within a reasonable timeout without manual refresh
E2E test verifies tool count or plugin state changes are reflected in the side panel

userStories.title: E2E tests for source maps in plugin IIFE bundles
userStories.description: As a platform developer, I want E2E tests verifying that source maps are generated and accessible for debugging.
acceptanceCriteria: E2E test verifies dist/adapter.iife.js.map exists after plugin build
E2E test verifies the IIFE contains a //# sourceMappingURL comment
E2E test verifies the source map is valid JSON with expected fields (version, sources, mappings)
